/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/reverb_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libreverb_plugin.so -o libreverb_plugin.so CMakeFiles/reverb_plugin.dir/reverb_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reverb_plugin.dir/reverb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reverb_plugin.dir/reverb_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
